stable_facts: Jamie Dimon is the Chairman and CEO of JPMorgan Chase
JPMorgan Chase is headquartered in New York City
JPMorgan Chase is the largest bank in the United States by assets
expected_patterns: mentions JPMorgan revenue or net income figure for recent period
mentions investment banking or markets revenue
mentions geopolitical risk tariffs or macroeconomic uncertainty
mentions Basel III capital requirements or regulatory environment
mentions consumer banking or retail deposit growth
references SEC filing Bloomberg Reuters or WSJ as source
forbidden_content: Jamie Dimon has resigned or retired
JPMorgan is not the largest US bank
notes: Tests financial sector coverage. JPMorgan is genuinely strong financially — Skeptic should reflect neutral-to-positive sentiment. Primary risks are macroeconomic uncertainty and regulatory capital requirements not internal failures.
